hypothesis: A previous review request to Odin for the CittaVerse payment system failed or was lost. Re-initiating to ensure quality gate is passed before production.
action_plan: Spawn a sub-agent (Odin) via `sessions_spawn`. Task: Assume the persona of Odin, a critical and unforgiving logic/quality reviewer for the CittaVerse project. Review the proposed pricing model (999 Digital / 2999 Physical Book / 6999 AI Avatar), the payment gateway choice (Alipay API with manual settlement), and the UI design concepts (Plan A: High-end literature/heirloom, Plan B: Scientific/Therapy, Plan C: Experience/Gift). Address the 3 specific questions posed by Citta-Core: 1. Does the proposed design (specifically Plan A) support the 2999 RMB premium? 2. Are there logical dead ends in the payment/settlement flow that could break user trust? 3. Which Plan should be adopted, or how should they be merged? Output a brutal, structured review report.
